records.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: game weapon-skin source for later UV-aware composition. Generate one original dense landscape master artwork, approximately 16:9, for the Midnight Serenity weapon-skin theme. Theme content: An ornate, moss-covered stone lantern emitting a soft, ethereal cyan glow.; A graceful, semi-translucent koi fish with flowing fins, caught mid-turn in dark water.; Closed and partially blooming lotus flowers with bioluminescent tips.; Vertical, segmented bamboo stalks that serve as grounding frame lines.; Subtle, overlapping circular ripples on a dark, wet-stone texture.; Dark, worn flagstone paving tiles with fine fissures and moss accumulation.; Delicate, trailing willow branches that frame the upper edge of the receiver.; Tiny, scattered pin-points of light creating depth and motion across the canvas.. Narrative: The weapon becomes a cross-section of a secret moonlit courtyard. The stock anchors the scene in a dark, mossy perimeter, while the receiver serves as the primary pond feature, with the magazine acting as a submerged descent into the water.. Theme enrichment notes: Utilize a seamless, dark-to-light gradient across the weapon body to mimic the transition from the dark floor of the garden to the illuminated water surface.; The receiver should prioritize the stone lantern and the koi as the central focus.. Style: A high-contrast exploration of a nocturnal garden where cold stone textures are punctured by ethereal, glowing botanical and aquatic life forms. The aesthetic balances architectural rigidity with fluid organic motion.. Visual language: wet slate crackle, bioluminescent flora veins, submerged refractive ripples, bamboo segment geometry, floating firefly particle drift. Palette: #0B132B, #1C2541, #3A506B, #7FFFD4, #E94560, #F4F4F4. Fill the complete canvas with layered, high-quality, high-density visual information at several scales. Every large crop must remain attractive and richly detailed. Build a complete thematic world with many medium and small clusters: primary forms, related symbolic objects, environment, architecture or nature, atmospheric connectors, linework, and material texture. No single subject may dominate more than roughly 35% of the canvas width or height, and no subject may stretch across the full image width. Weave these elements through every region rather than arranging isolated stickers on empty space. Do not split it into component assets and do not reserve large plain or near-black areas. This image will be fitted to continuous weapon space and automatically cut into the OBJ-derived UV atlas. Do not draw a weapon, weapon mockup, UV layout, text, logo, watermark, frame, presentation board, or product render. Locked candidate art direction: Spectral Movement (candidate_02_direction_koi_flow). Concept: Focuses on the fluid motion of koi across the weapon's curved geometry.. Motifs: spectral koi, water ripples, lotus petals. Expanded thematic world: Pagoda Lantern, Spectral Koi, Glowing Lotus, Black Bamboo, Water Ripples, Wet Flagstone, Weeping Willow Boughs, Firefly Swarm, An ornate, moss-covered stone lantern emitting a soft, ethereal cyan glow., A graceful, semi-translucent koi fish with flowing fins, caught mid-turn in dark water., Closed and partially blooming lotus flowers with bioluminescent tips., Vertical, segmented bamboo stalks that serve as grounding frame lines., Subtle, overlapping circular ripples on a dark, wet-stone texture., Dark, worn flagstone paving tiles with fine fissures and moss accumulation., Delicate, trailing willow branches that frame the upper edge of the receiver., Tiny, scattered pin-points of light creating depth and motion across the canvas., small symbolic objects related to the main theme, environmental fragments that imply a complete world, atmospheric connectors and motion rhythms, fine material grain and ornamental micro-detail, glowing lotus petals, translucent koi scales, segmented black bamboo, stacked pagodas, rippled dark water, wet slate crackle, bioluminescent flora veins, submerged refractive ripples, bamboo segment geometry, floating firefly particle drift, porous weathered stone, cool-touch silk-finish water, glowing emissive plant fiber, matte metallic dark accents. Route-B emphasis: Brief: garden. Style: A high-contrast exploration of a nocturnal garden where cold stone textures are punctured by ethereal, glowing botanical and aquatic life forms. The aesthetic balances architectural rigidity with fluid organic motion.. Direction: Focuses on the fluid motion of koi across the weapon's curved geometry.. Visual language: wet slate crackle, bioluminescent flora veins, submerged refractive ripples, bamboo segment geometry, floating firefly particle drift. Motifs: spectral koi, water ripples, lotus petals. Palette: #0B132B, #1C2541, #3A506B, #7FFFD4, #E94560, #F4F4F4. Material cues: porous weathered stone, cool-touch silk-finish water, glowing emissive plant fiber, matte metallic dark accents. Route B objective: generate one complete, dense, crop-robust master artwork, fit it across continuous left/right/top weapon space, then automatically cut and repack it through the OBJ-derived UV atlas. Distribute useful visual information at multiple scales across the full image; avoid large empty regions. Subject-part placement on named weapon components is not required or evaluated. Avoid: sharp vector edges, uniform grid layouts, bright daylight saturation, industrial hardware schematics, hyper-realistic human anatomy.. Do not drift to another art direction. CRITICAL SOURCE-ASSET MODE: all weapon names, component names, and placement descriptions above are placement metadata only for later composition. No weapon or weapon part may appear. Do not depict, imply, crop, silhouette, emboss, or texture any firearm, weapon, receiver, trigger, grip, magazine, stock, barrel, muzzle, mechanical weapon part, weapon mockup, product mockup, UV layout, rectangular material sample, framed tile, or presentation board. COMPOSITION-GROUP CONTRACT: preserve the requested spatial structure and narrative purpose exactly; spanning sources must read as one continuous elongated subject, grouped sources as coordinated reusable units, and independent sources as one component-specific mark. MASTER-ARTWORK CONTRACT: create one dense, opaque, edge-to-edge landscape thematic artwork with strong local detail at multiple scales. Large crops from any part of the image must remain visually rich. Use many medium and small subject clusters rather than one oversized subject: no single element may occupy more than roughly 35% of the canvas width or height, and no subject may span the complete image width. Weave primary motifs, supporting symbols, environmental fragments, atmospheric connectors, linework, and material texture through every region. Do not isolate motifs as separate stickers and do not leave large plain or near-black negative-space pockets. Do not draw a weapon, weapon part, mockup, UV layout, text, logo, watermark, border, framed panel, presentation board, or product render. Subject-part placement is not evaluated. Output only the landscape 2D source artwork, approximately 16:9, with no text, logo, watermark, border, annotation, or explanation.
CANDIDATE VARIATION 4: motion-led composition using several partial subject glimpses, directional clouds or energy, waves, sparks, fragments, and compact secondary events without a single full-width hero. Create a materially different composition from the other candidates while preserving the locked direction and palette. Include at least ten visually distinct clusters distributed across the landscape canvas. Keep the main theme readable through repeated medium/small appearances and related elements, not one giant central subject.

RETRY CORRECTION: Fix only these source-gate failures: semantic reviewer rejected source: The artwork contains forbidden objects that violate the source contract.; violations: The artwork contains small, rectangular, framed-looking objects (scrolls and miniature blocks on a stone platform) that resemble presentation or product samples.; The composition features clear, framed-style 'staged' groupings that violate the requirement to avoid presentation or sample-board aesthetics.; The inclusion of miniature model objects (pagodas/scrolls) acts as a mock-up of elements rather than integrated environmental world-building.. Preserve the locked art direction and the master_artwork semantic role.

master_artwork.semantic_status: The artwork successfully depicts a nocturnal garden scene adhering to the Midnight Serenity theme. It features multiple distributed clusters of koi, bioluminescent lotus flowers, stone lanterns, bamboo stalks, and moss-covered flagstones. The composition is dense, lacks large dark voids, and avoids all forbidden elements such as weapon mocks, borders, or presentation board aesthetics.
